task_description: Fix build error in StakingScreen, fix news/story detail screens (image ratio + audio streaming), restructure Ngepet lobby UI (bottom toolbar, rules, token display, avatar fix, button fix), and fix intruder phase issues (center text, keep dialog open after wrong guess)

verification.summary: Cannot build (no Android SDK). All changes verified through grep-based code review. FEAT-004 review fixes: MediaPlayer lifecycle fixed (isPlaying moved inside OnPreparedListener, OnErrorListener added, stop() wrapped in try-catch), duplicate Inventory button removed from bottom toolbar, image URL trimStart applied.
